title: pseudolysimachion rotundum subsp. subintegrum
intro: Pseudolysimachion rotundum subsp. subintegrum, also known as subintegral round pseudolysimachion, is a plant species within the family Apiaceae. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, where it is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pseudolysimachion rotundum subsp. subintegrum include relief from respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, often in combination with other herbs, to be used for medicinal purposes.
